channel.title: Car Showcase Brand Updates
channel.description: RSS feed with brand pages and subscription updates from Car Showcase

item.title: Ford brand updates
item.description: Discover Ford models and subscribe to Ford updates in the app.

item.title: Toyota brand updates
item.description: Toyota highlights and subscription access from the project.

item.title: Subaru brand updates
item.description: Explore Subaru content and follow updates from the app.

item.title: Porsche brand updates
item.description: Porsche content available through the Car Showcase project.

item.title: Mitsubishi brand updates
item.description: Mitsubishi page and brand-related app content.
